name: LLM CLI
title: LLM CLI: ⌥ Chat · ⇧ Mail · ⌃ Müşteri · ⌘ Codex · ⌘⌃ Picker
description: Rewrite selected text through Ollama, Codex, Claude, Gemini, or OpenCode.

options.label: Click Action
options.description: What a normal click does. Modifier shortcuts still run directly.

options.label: Provider
options.description: CLI provider to use when Click Action is Run Directly. The provider must already be installed and logged in.

options.label: Model
options.description: Optional model name. Leave blank to use the CLI default.

options.label: Timeout Seconds
options.description: Maximum seconds before an external CLI request is cancelled.

options.label: Menu Config Path
options.description: Optional JSON menu config path. Leave blank for ~/.config/popclip-llm-cli-rewrite/menu.json.

options.label: Custom Prompt
options.description: Used only when Preset is Custom.
